name: search_widget
title: File Search Tutorial
description: Learn how to search for files and integrate with other tools

steps.text:
🔍 File Search Patterns

Enter search terms to find files by name. Use wildcards (*) for pattern matching, or simple text to find files containing those words.

📂 Search Location

Choose which directory to search in. You can search your entire system or limit to specific folders for faster, targeted results.

🔍 Browse for Folder

Click here to visually select a folder to search in. Much easier than typing long paths!

📁 Include Subdirectories

Check this to search within all subfolders too. Uncheck for faster searches limited to the main folder only.

💾 Search Loaded PDFs

Search through PDFs currently loaded in other widgets (Split, Merge, etc.) without scanning the filesystem.

🚀 Start Search

Begin searching for files matching your criteria. Results will appear below with file details, size, dates, and relevance scoring.

➕ Quick Integration

Send selected search results directly to other tools like Split PDF or Merge PDFs for immediate processing! Great workflow integration.
